Upcoming Events

Our programs and events offer women a chance to learn, share, and transform as philanthropists. You have a range of options to feel inspired, informed and ready to think boldly about what comes next.

We welcome suggestions for future programming. Please send your ideas to programs@wawomensfdn.org.

UPCOMING EVENTS
WaWF events are a mix of in-person, virtual (generally Zoom with the option to join by phone), or some hybrid of the two. Please see the details of each event for information about the event type (virtual, in-person, or hybrid). 

  • UPCOMING EVENTS
  • PAST EVENTS

Learn & Connect

Get engaged with us by attending our philanthropy learning series, visiting a grantee, or attending one of our grant award celebrations.
